subcodes.first_line: O youth of heart and soul! Youth pertaineth to the heart and soul, not to this frail frame. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان دل و جوان جان جوانی بدل و جان است نه به کالبد سست بنیان الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
